interpolation.description: Latent space interpolation between a ring graph (Graph A) and a star graph (Graph B)

karateClub.description: Zachary's Karate Club graph (1977). 34 members, 78 edges. Ground truth: two communities after club split.

wlTest.name: Star K₁,₅ vs Path P₆
wlTest.description: Different degree distributions make these trivially distinguishable.

wlTest.name: C₆+short chord vs C₆+long chord
wlTest.description: Same degree sequence [2,2,2,2,3,3]. Neighborhood refinement reveals structural difference.

wlTest.name: C₆ vs C₃∪C₃
wlTest.description: Both 2-regular — all nodes identical to WL. This is the fundamental expressivity limit of 1-WL and message-passing GNNs.
